title: BBRI leads the top net foreign buy list
body: BBRI topped net foreign buy list on Thursday (16/1), replacing FREN that stood as top net buy yesterday (15/1).

title: Foreign transaction volume down, net sell 195.25 million
body: After being displaced, GOTO shares once more had the biggest net sell of 220.63 million shares.

title: Jeffrey Limas Lim purchases over 212 million Janu Putra Sejahtera (AYAM) shares
body: DBS Bank Ltd. also keeps adding Pizza Hut stock.

title: Learn who Indonesia's largest foreign debt creditors are
body: IBRD channelled USD 21.28 billion, making it the largest creditor of Indonesia's foreign debt (ULN).

title: Two overseas investors sell shares of ITSEC Asia (CYBR)
body: Shares of HELI, a business that offers helicopter rental services, is purchased by PT Startel Communication.

body: IBRD channelled USD 21.28 billion, making it the largest creditor of Indonesia's foreign debt (ULN).

title: Two overseas investors sell shares of ITSEC Asia (CYBR)
body: Shares of HELI, a business that offers helicopter rental services, is purchased by PT Startel Communication.

title: JCI maintains green zone until the end of the first session
body: Jakarta Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) maintains its position at the green zone until the closing of the first session on Thursday (16/1).

title: Indonesia’s highest imports come from these two countries
body: Indonesia recorded two major importers for non-oil and gas throughout 2024.

title: OJK launches new regulations, debt collectors may now collect from borrowers
body: OJK now permits debt collection services for non-performing loans from online lending (pinjol) platforms operating through Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Lending

title: CUAN reports remaining IPO funds of IDR 118.29 billion
body: The remaining IPO funds of IDR 118.29 billion are currently held in current accounts at PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) and PT Bank Central Asia Tbk (BBCA), with interest rates of 3-4% per annum.

title: SUNI won tender of Pertamina Hulu Sanga Sanga worth IDR 130 billion
body: The tender involves the supply of COO casing 12-3/8” Grade K55 for PHSS, with a total value of IDR 129.89 billion.

title: TGUK realises IPO proceeds by 98.5%, the allocation revealed
body: TGUK has realised 98.5% of IPO proceeds after over a year entering the stock market. Here's the allocation.

title: Curators reveals discordances in Sritex bankruptcy
body: These discordances unveiled by curators thus raise significant questions: What lies behind the bankruptcy of Indonesia's largest textile company?

title: JCI recovers from its lowest level to 7,079.56
body: Banking stocks brought in the highest contribution for JCI's upturn.

title: Foreign sell volume still high; net sell recorded 210 million shares
body: After foreign investors released 3.06 billion shares but only purchased about 2.85 billion, the net foreign volume on Wednesday, January 15, was still shown as a net sell.

title: BI cuts interest rate, analysts say rupiah will be more vulnerable
body: Economists and analysts say BI is now changing its focus to safeguard the domestic economy, by cutting interest rates.

title: FREN and BBRI are foreign investors’ favourites
body: FREN and BBRI were at the top of the net buy list until the close of trading on Wednesday (15/1).

title: QRIS transaction volume saw 175.2% surge in 2024
body: Digital payments in 2024 recorded a total of 34.5 billion transactions, growing by 36.1% year-on-year (yoy).

title: BI rate drops to 5.75%
body: BI has lowered the BI rate to 5.75% from the previous 6%, taking into account the inflation forecast for 2025 and 2026.

title: Bond payment deferred, PPRO suspension extended
body: The suspension follows the payment delay of the 11th coupon of its Sustainable Bond II Phase IV Year 2022 Series B, amounting to IDR 4.33 billion, to bondholders.

title: Total imports rose by 5.31% throughout 2024
body: BPS recorded an increase in total imports throughout 2024 compared to 2023, with the rise coming from both the oil and gas and non-oil and gas sectors.

title: BBHI realises all rights issue proceeds
body: In addition, BBHI is projecting double-digit loan growth in 2025, with a minimum target of 10 percent.

title: In 2024, trade balance surplus declined by 15.84%
body: BPS recorded decrease in trade surplus throughout 2024 compared to full-year 2023, affected by lower non-oil and gas trade surplus and higher oil and gas deficit.

title: CASH to hold MESOP I next year, setting up discount rate
body: CASH will hold MESOP Phase I worth IDR 2.39 billion next week to give ownership option to its management and employees alike.

title: Reallocating IPO proceeds, BEER to lease factory in Central Java
body: BEER, a fermented beverage manufacturer, will change the plan of the IPO proceeds utilisation from land acquisition to factory lease in Central Java.

title: PURI bags IDR 332 billion from apartment sales
body: “This project has a total target revenue of IDR 1.5 trillion. As of now, the company is focusing on completing Phase 1, consisting of four towers and 1,264 units in total, and is setting revenue target of IDR 514 in 2025.”

title: Suspension lifted, UANG saw corrections
body: UANG was corrected by IDR 25 to IDR 600 per share only one day after Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) lifted its suspension.

title: RATU listed under UMA after 5-days of ARA, now overvalued
body: This price surge brings RATU’s P/E Ratio to 34.06, much higher compared to the average of energy and oil-and-gas companies.

title: Research: ARPU dropped, are telecommunication stocks still attractive?
body: Slowed-down demand and fierce competition are said to be the factor of ARPU's dip of up to 5% yoy in the telecommunication sector.

title: Oil tanker rates surge after US sanction on Russia
body: Importers to seek out other suppliers following the sanction given by the United States (US) government to Russia.

title: JCI down 0.86%, lowest in 7 months
body: Shares of big caps dragged down JCI, falling to the lowest level in 7 months.

title: Foreign sales volume remains high; net sell at 832 million shares
body: A total of 2.47 billion shares were purchased and 3.31 billion shares were sold by foreign investors on Tuesday, January 14.

title: Conditions met, Yonden is close to officially acquire HGII
body: The acquisition was carried out over 1,62 billion shares, with price set to IDR 200 each, thus bringing total investment value to IDR 325 billion.

title: Amar Bank's embedded banking now available on JULO
body: The official statement mentioned that the credit facility available to JULO users could reach up to IDR 50 million.

title: OJK urges financial institutions to ease mortgage loans for low-income families
body: OJK is encouraging financial service institutions to facilitate the provision of housing ownership loans (KPR) for low-income households.

title: DBS Bank Ltd divests 23.20 million shares of PZZA
body: DBS Bank Ltd, one of PZZA's shareholders, divested its portion in a transaction last week (7/1).
